_comment: ESTIMATES ONLY — not an invoice. Rates are USD per 1,000,000 tokens. Verify current prices at https://www.anthropic.com/pricing and https://platform.claude.com/pricing before relying on cost figures. Cache-write tokens are billed at input_rate x 1.25 and cache-read tokens at input_rate x 0.10 (handled in CostCalculator). Models whose family is not listed here (incl. <synthetic> and local models) are reported as cost n/a. 'fable' and 'mythos' rates are placeholders pending official figures — verify them.
